top.heroDesc: Cube is a Discord Bot that combines automation, role management, and AI moderation in one.
top.featuresDesc: Powerful features that work together seamlessly to keep your server running smoothly.
top.ctaDesc: Join 12,000+ servers already using Cube to automate their Discord experience.

hero.title: Take your server to the next level.
hero.desc: Cube is a Discord Bot that combines automation, role management, and AI moderation in one.

autoPurge.desc: Automatically delete messages after a set time

autoReact.desc: Automatically react to messages with emojis

roleKeeper.desc: Automatically manage and restore member roles

aiMod.desc: AI monitors and responds to chat in real time

dashboard.noServersDesc: There are no servers with Cube, or you don't have admin permissions
dashboard.loginDesc: Please log in with Discord to access your dashboard.
dashboard.permissionDeniedDesc: You don't have admin permissions for this server.
dashboard.refreshHint: Don't see your server? Try refreshing after adding the bot.

overview.desc: Check your server status and available features

automation.label: Automation

lang.title: Bot Language
lang.desc: Select the language the bot will use in this server

autoPurge.title: Auto Purge
autoPurge.desc: Automatically deletes messages in specified channels on a schedule

autoReact.title: Auto React
autoReact.desc: Automatically reacts to all posts in a channel

rolekeeper.title: Role Keeper
rolekeeper.desc: Configure automatic role restoration when members leave and rejoin

enable.label: Enable Role Keeper
enable.desc: When enabled, members who rejoin will have their previous roles automatically restored

excludeAdmin.label: Exclude Admin Roles
excludeAdmin.desc: Admin roles will be excluded from restoration

excludeMod.label: Exclude Moderator Roles
excludeMod.desc: Moderator roles will be excluded from restoration

aimod.title: AI Moderation
aimod.desc: Configure automatic chat monitoring and response by AI

purchaseFlow.ccNote: Credits are valid for 180 days from purchase
